highlights.title: Your distillations finally have one home
highlights.description: Every passage you distilled across your books now lives in one searchable Distillation library. Can't remember which book a line was from? Search it and jump straight back to the original annotation.

highlights.title: Read foreign books with the translation right beside the text
highlights.description: The EPUB reader adds chapter-level bilingual reading, showing the translation next to the original per chapter. Translations are cached and restore after a restart, so you can read a whole chapter without switching back and forth.

highlights.title: Collection covers fan open
highlights.description: Recent covers in a collection stack like a hand of cards and spread out when you hover or focus, so you can tell what's inside without opening it.

highlights.title: Smoother scrolling, calmer feedback
highlights.description: Reading progress now renders on the compositor for smoother scrolling of long texts, settings save feedback is a restrained entrance instead of an oversized bounce, and first-run empty pages guide you in with a gentle reveal.

highlights.title: A big library opens without lag
highlights.description: Startup no longer loads your entire library at once; a paged catalog with full-text search keeps things responsive, and the more books you have, the more you'll notice.

highlights.title: Steadier progress, sync, and settings
highlights.description: Reading progress is kept for retry after a failed save so it isn't lost, WeRead sync rejects incomplete data instead of overwriting your local notes, and newer settings save correctly.
